query:
You are working on the ankidroid/Anki-Android repository.
The codebase is at version 2.173 (commit: 93f4312a).

## Issue to Resolve

Add `Show play buttons on cards with audio` preference as in Anki Desktop
**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
Anki Desktop has a feature called  `Show play buttons on cards with audio`, but AnkiDroid doesn't have it

**Describe the solution you'd like**
Add the pref to AnkiDroid


**Additional context**
![image](https://github.com/ankidroid/Anki-Android/assets/69634269/37388d7f-7313-4ce6-86f9-9f04d228dddf)

## Additional Context from Issue Discussion

https://github.com/search?q=repo%3Aankitects%2Fanki%20hide_audio_play_buttons&type=code

https://github.com/ankitects/anki/blob/e327195470824074465657f98bb0282c7c93a56e/qt/aqt/main.py#L587-L592

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/AbstractFlashcardViewer.kt`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/analytics/UsageAnalytics.kt`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/cardviewer/HtmlGenerator.kt`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/preferences/AppearanceSettingsFragment.kt`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/libanki/SoundKt.kt`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/res/values/preferences.xml`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/res/xml/preferences_appearance.xml`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

## Important Evaluation Notes

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

 28→        android:title="@string/pref_cat_appearance"
 29→        android:key="@string/pref_appearance_screen_key">
 30→    <PreferenceCategory android:title="@string/pref_cat_themes" >
 31→        <ListPreference
 32→            android:defaultValue="0"
 33→            android:entries="@array/app_theme_labels"
 34→            android:entryValues="@array/app_theme_values"
 35→            android:key="@string/app_theme_key"
 36→            android:title="@string/app_theme"
 37→            android:icon="@drawable/ic_color_lens_white_24dp"
 38→            app:useSimpleSummaryProvider="true"/>
 39→        <ListPreference
 40→            android:defaultValue="1"
 41→            android:entries="@array/day_theme_labels"
 42→            android:entryValues="@array/day_theme_values"
 43→            android:key="@string/day_theme_key"
 44→            android:shouldDisableView="true"
 45→            android:title="@string/day_theme"
 46→            android:icon="@drawable/ic_light_mode_24"
 47→            app:useSimpleSummaryProvider="true"
 48→            search:ignore="true"/>
 49→        <ListPreference
 50→            android:defaultValue="3"
 51→            android:entries="@array/night_theme_labels"
 52→            android:entryValues="@array/night_theme_values"
 53→            android:key="@string/night_theme_key"
 54→            android:shouldDisableView="true"
 55→            android:title="@string/night_theme"
 56→            android:icon="@drawable/ic_dark_mode_24"
 57→            app:useSimpleSummaryProvider="true"
 58→            search:ignore="true"/>
 59→    </PreferenceCategory>
 60→    <PreferenceCategory android:title="@string/background_image_title" >
 61→        <Preference
 62→            android:defaultValue="0"
 63→            android:key="@string/pref_deck_picker_background_key"
 64→            android:shouldDisableView="true"
 65→            android:icon="@drawable/wallpaper_icon"
 66→            android:title="@string/choose_an_image" />
 67→    </PreferenceCategory>
 68→    <PreferenceCategory android:title="@string/pref_cat_reviewer" >
 69→        <Preference
 70→            android:summary="@string/custom_buttons_summary"
 71→            android:title="@string/custom_buttons"
 72→            android:key="@string/custom_buttons_link_preference"
 73→            android:fragment="com.ichi2.anki.preferences.CustomButtonsSettingsFragment"
 74→            search:ignore="true"/>
 75→        <ListPreference
 76→            android:defaultValue="0"
 77→            android:key="@string/fullscreen_mode_preference"
 78→            android:entries="@array/full_screen_mode_labels"
 79→            android:entryValues="@array/full_screen_mode_values"
 80→            android:title="@string/fullscreen_review"
 81→            app:useSimpleSummaryProvider="true"/>
 82→        <SwitchPreferenceCompat
 83→            android:defaultValue="false"
 84→            android:key="@string/center_vertically_preference"
 85→            android:summary="@string/vertical_centering_summ"
 86→            android:title="@string/vertical_centering" />
 87→        <SwitchPreferenceCompat
 88→            android:key="@string/show_estimates_preference"
 89→            android:summary="@string/show_estimates_summ"
 90→            android:title="@string/show_estimates" />
 91→        <ListPreference
 92→            android:defaultValue="bottom"
 93→            android:entries="@array/answer_buttons_position_labels"
 94→            android:entryValues="@array/answer_buttons_position"
 95→            android:key="@string/answer_buttons_position_preference"
 96→            android:title="@string/answer_buttons_position"
 97→            app:useSimpleSummaryProvider="true"/>
 98→        <SwitchPreferenceCompat
 99→            android:key="@string/show_topbar_preference"
100→            android:defaultValue="true"
101→            android:summary="@string/show_top_bar_summ"
102→            android:title="@string/show_top_bar" />
103→        <SwitchPreferenceCompat
104→            android:key="@string/show_progress_preference"
105→            android:dependency="@string/show_topbar_preference"
106→            android:summary="@string/show_progress_summ"
107→            android:title="@string/show_progress" />
108→        <SwitchPreferenceCompat
109→            android:key="@string/show_eta_preference"
110→            android:defaultValue="false"
111→            android:summary="@string/show_eta_summ"
112→            android:title="@string/show_eta" />
113→        <SwitchPreferenceCompat
114→            android:key="@string/show_audio_play_buttons_key"
115→            android:defaultValue="true"
116→            tools:title="Show play buttons on cards with audio"
117→            />
118→        <SwitchPreferenceCompat
119→            android:key="@string/show_deck_title_key"
120→            android:defaultValue="false"
121→            android:title="@string/show_deck_title"/>
122→    </PreferenceCategory>
123→    <PreferenceCategory android:title="@string/card_browser">
124→        <SwitchPreferenceCompat
125→            android:checked="false"
126→            android:defaultValue="false"
127→            android:key="@string/pref_display_filenames_in_browser_key"
128→            android:title="@string/card_browser_hide_media"
129→            android:summary="@string/card_browser_hide_media_summary"/>
130→    </PreferenceCategory>
131→</PreferenceScreen>

 23→<!-- Fonts & Style Preferences -->
 24→<PreferenceScreen xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
 25→    xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
 26→    xmlns:search="http://schemas.android.com/apk/com.bytehamster.lib.preferencesearch"
 27→    xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools"
 28→        android:title="@string/pref_cat_appearance"
 29→        android:key="@string/pref_appearance_screen_key">
 30→    <PreferenceCategory android:title="@string/pref_cat_themes" >
 31→        <ListPreference
 32→            android:defaultValue="0"
 33→            android:entries="@array/app_theme_labels"
 34→            android:entryValues="@array/app_theme_values"
 35→            android:key="@string/app_theme_key"
 36→            android:title="@string/app_theme"
 37→            android:icon="@drawable/ic_color_lens_white_24dp"
 38→            app:useSimpleSummaryProvider="true"/>
 39→        <ListPreference
 40→            android:defaultValue="1"
 41→            android:entries="@array/day_theme_labels"
 42→            android:entryValues="@array/day_theme_values"
 43→            android:key="@string/day_theme_key"
 44→            android:shouldDisableView="true"
 45→            android:title="@string/day_theme"
 46→            android:icon="@drawable/ic_light_mode_24"
 47→            app:useSimpleSummaryProvider="true"
 48→            search:ignore="true"/>
 49→        <ListPreference
 50→            android:defaultValue="3"
 51→            android:entries="@array/night_theme_labels"
 52→            android:entryValues="@array/night_theme_values"
 53→            android:key="@string/night_theme_key"
 54→            android:shouldDisableView="true"
 55→            android:title="@string/night_theme"
 56→            android:icon="@drawable/ic_dark_mode_24"
 57→            app:useSimpleSummaryProvider="true"
 58→            search:ignore="true"/>
 59→    </PreferenceCategory>
 60→    <PreferenceCategory android:title="@string/background_image_title" >
 61→        <Preference
 62→            android:defaultValue="0"
 63→            android:key="@string/pref_deck_picker_background_key"
 64→            android:shouldDisableView="true"
 65→            android:icon="@drawable/wallpaper_icon"
 66→            android:title="@string/choose_an_image" />
 67→    </PreferenceCategory>
 68→    <PreferenceCategory android:title="@string/pref_cat_reviewer" >
 69→        <Preference
 70→            android:summary="@string/custom_buttons_summary"
 71→            android:title="@string/custom_buttons"
 72→            android:key="@string/custom_buttons_link_preference"
 73→            android:fragment="com.ichi2.anki.preferences.CustomButtonsSettingsFragment"
 74→            search:ignore="true"/>
 75→        <ListPreference
 76→            android:defaultValue="0"
 77→            android:key="@string/fullscreen_mode_preference"
 78→            android:entries="@array/full_screen_mode_labels"
 79→            android:entryValues="@array/full_screen_mode_values"
 80→            android:title="@string/fullscreen_review"
 81→            app:useSimpleSummaryProvider="true"/>
 82→        <SwitchPreferenceCompat
 83→            android:defaultValue="false"
 84→            android:key="@string/center_vertically_preference"
 85→            android:summary="@string/vertical_centering_summ"
 86→            android:title="@string/vertical_centering" />
 87→        <SwitchPreferenceCompat
 88→            android:key="@string/show_estimates_preference"
 89→            android:summary="@string/show_estimates_summ"
 90→            android:title="@string/show_estimates" />
 91→        <ListPreference
 92→            android:defaultValue="bottom"
 93→            android:entries="@array/answer_buttons_position_labels"
 94→            android:entryValues="@array/answer_buttons_position"
 95→            android:key="@string/answer_buttons_position_preference"
 96→            android:title="@string/answer_buttons_position"
 97→            app:useSimpleSummaryProvider="true"/>
 98→        <SwitchPreferenceCompat
 99→            android:key="@string/show_topbar_preference"
100→            android:defaultValue="true"
101→            android:summary="@string/show_top_bar_summ"
102→            android:title="@string/show_top_bar" />
103→        <SwitchPreferenceCompat
104→            android:key="@string/show_progress_preference"
105→            android:dependency="@string/show_topbar_preference"
106→            android:summary="@string/show_progress_summ"
107→            android:title="@string/show_progress" />
108→        <SwitchPreferenceCompat
109→            android:key="@string/show_eta_preference"
110→            android:defaultValue="false"
111→            android:summary="@string/show_eta_summ"
112→            android:title="@string/show_eta" />
113→        <SwitchPreferenceCompat
114→            android:key="@string/show_audio_play_buttons_key"
115→            android:defaultValue="true"
116→            tools:title="Show play buttons on cards with audio"
117→            />
118→        <SwitchPreferenceCompat
119→            android:key="@string/show_deck_title_key"
120→            android:defaultValue="false"
121→            android:title="@string/show_deck_title"/>
122→    </PreferenceCategory>
123→    <PreferenceCategory android:title="@string/card_browser">
124→        <SwitchPreferenceCompat
125→            android:checked="false"
126→            android:defaultValue="false"
127→            android:key="@string/pref_display_filenames_in_browser_key"
128→            android:title="@string/card_browser_hide_media"
129→            android:summary="@string/card_browser_hide_media_summary"/>
130→    </PreferenceCategory>
131→</PreferenceScreen>
132→
